productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Yellow Daisy Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton yellow baby Daisy topWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis yellow top from disney with a Daisy print and white ruffle detailing on the chest is great for all little girls who have a mischevious streak. Team this up with shorts or jeans when you take her out for an active day in the park.
